name: raycast-chemical
title: Chemical Catalog Search
description: Search Daejung, Samchun, and Sigma-Aldrich chemical catalogs by name or CAS number in Raycast.
author: cpm9662

commands.name: search-chemicals
commands.title: Search Chemicals
commands.subtitle: Daejung, Samchun, Sigma-Aldrich
commands.description: Search all supported supplier catalogs by chemical name or CAS number

preferences.name: titleMaxLength
preferences.title: Title Max Length
preferences.description: Maximum number of characters shown before truncating a product title.

preferences.name: showGrade
preferences.title: Show Grade
preferences.label: Display grade in the subtitle
preferences.description: Show reagent grade codes like EP, GR, or KP after pack size and price.

preferences.name: showCatalogNumber
preferences.title: Show Catalog Number
preferences.label: Display catalog number in the accessory columns
preferences.description: Show Daejung Catalog#, Samchun product code, and Sigma SKU next to manufacturer.
